 Your last chance for a Friends Meal? Now.

Denys, is your collection of Friends figurines not complete yet?

Well, soon itвҖҷll be too late. рҹҳұ

So grab a *Friends Meal* while you still can.

*You choose the size* вҖ” a Medium or Large McMenu В® вҖ” *and whatвҖҷs inside* : the Maestro Piccante Pia, the Veggie Deluxe or the McChicken В®. Prefer a different burger? Anything goes.

And the *Friends figurine* *? That remains a surprise until the very end.

So better hurry, bestieвҖҰ this your very last chance to complete your collection!
